$comment: Base harness settings deployed by setup-project-ai. The generator adds stack-specific Bash allow entries (pytest/npm/etc.) based on detection. Pipeline MCP server is NOT registered by default — the lightweight loop (plan file + relay) is the default. To enable the optional pipeline power-mode, add an mcpServers.junai entry pointing at the FastMCP server plus a .github/pipeline-state.json.

hooks.command: test -f relay.md && printf '\n=== relay.md ===\n' && cat relay.md || true
test -f relay.md && printf '\n=== [PreCompact] relay.md ===\n' && cat relay.md || true
printf '\n[HARNESS] Session ending — update relay.md + extract nuggets to docs/gold-nuggets-log.md if needed.\n'
